# cirro_project_member (Resource)

Manages a user's role within a Cirro project. Destroying this resource sets the user's role to NONE, removing their access.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cirro_project_member" "example" {
  project_id = cirro_project.example.id
  username   = "jsmith"
  role       = "CONTRIBUTOR"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) Project identifier.
- `role` (String) Project role: OWNER, ADMIN, CONTRIBUTOR, or COLLABORATOR.
- `username` (String) Cirro username of the member.

### Optional

- `suppress_notification` (Boolean) When true, suppresses the email notification sent to the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier: {project_id}/{username}.
